---
title: "Lacerda_project"
author: "Matheus Ardigueri"
date: "2026-04-17"
output: html_document
---

# Importing Libraries and setting up

```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(performance)
```

## Importing dataframe

```{r}
df <- read_csv("../data/plots_csv.csv")

names(df)
```
```{r}
df
```


## EDA


```{r}
df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(c(NDVI, SAVI),
               names_to = "indices",
               values_to = "values")

indices <- ggplot(data =  df_long, 
                  aes(x = Date,
                      y = values,
                      color = indices)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    x = "Dates",
    y = "Index Values"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = c(0.9,0.9))

indices

ggsave(filename = "../output/boxplot_eda.png",
       plot = indices,
       dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
names(df_long)
df_group <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Date,id,indices,values) %>%
  summarise(mean_vi_values = mean(values))


boxplot_final <- ggplot(data = df_group,
       aes(x = as.factor(Date),
            y = mean_vi_values
           )) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mean Index Value"
  )+
  facet_wrap(~indices) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x =  element_text(color = "black", size = 28),
    axis.title.y =  element_text(color = "black", size = 28),
    axis.text.x =  element_text(color = "black", size = 28),
    axis.text.y =  element_text(color = "black", size = 28),
    strip.text = element_text(color ="black", size = 28)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "../output/boxplot_final.png",
  plot = boxplot_final,
  dpi = 600,
  height = 15,
  width = 15
)


```


```{r}
linmod <- lmer(Yield ~ NDVI + SAVI + Elevation + (1|Rep),
               data = df)

summary(linmod)
```


```{r}
# R²
r2_vals <- r2(linmod)

# RMSE (with random effects)

# RMSE (fixed effects only)
rmse(df$Yield, predict(linmod, re.form = NA))
```

```{r}
df$pred <- predict(linmod)
```

```{r}


lin_reg <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Yield, y = pred)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  labs(
    x = "Observed Yield",
    y = "Predicted Yield",
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = max(df$Yield, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.75,
    y = min(df$pred, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.1 * diff(range(df$pred, na.rm = TRUE)),
    label = paste0(
      "Marginal R² = ", round(r2_vals$R2_marginal, 3), "\n",
      "Conditional R² = ", round(r2_vals$R2_conditional, 3), "\n",
      "Yield = 328967.73 - 26.28*NDVI", "\n",
      " + 617.80*SAVI - 2305.39*Elevation"
    ),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 9
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 28, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 28, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 28, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 28, color = "black")
  )

ggsave(filename = "../output/lin_reg.png",
       lin_reg,
       dpi = 600,
       height = 14,
       width = 19)
```
